_comment: MASTER SETTINGS FILE — edit this file to update brand details, contact info, social links, section visibility, and SEO. No code knowledge needed.

brand.name: Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
brand.description: Kolhapur's premier unisex salon and spa — where premium care meets personalised attention for every man and woman.

contact._note: Use the exact format shown. Phone is for display; whatsapp must include country code (91 for India) with no spaces or +.

address._note: Update all fields. mapEmbedUrl: go to Google Maps → your salon → Share → Embed a map → copy the src URL.
address.fullAddress: 5th Floor, Aurum Lohia Apartment, Aditya Corner, Opposite Purohit Sweets, Tarabai Park, Kolhapur, Maharashtra 416003

social._note: Paste the full URL for each platform. Leave empty string if you don't have that platform.

seo.defaultTitle: Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa | Tarabai Park, Kolhapur
seo.defaultDescription: Premium unisex salon and spa in Tarabai Park, Kolhapur. Hair, skin, bridal, spa, and wellness services for men and women. Rated 4.9★. Book your appointment today.
seo.keywords: salon kolhapur, spa kolhapur, unisex salon kolhapur, bridal makeup kolhapur, hair colour kolhapur, orchid salon, tarabai park salon, kolhapur beauty parlour

credits._note: Developer credit shown at the bottom of the footer. Set enabled to false to hide it. Leave link empty for plain text.

sections._note: Set any section to false to hide it from the website. Set back to true to show it again.
